candidate_llm_application: Sympathetic-overtone alternate-branch decoding at fundamental-prefix harmonic positions with bow-pressure cross-channel coupling

results.judge_justification: Mirror-SD's branch-complete speculative rollouts conditioned on early-exit signals are operationally the alternate-branch seeding at fundamental-prefix loci of confidence transition — exactly the harmonic-node concept renamed.
Dynamic-Width Spec Beam combines speculative + beam search dynamically; covers alternate-branch seeding with variable width per position — adjacent to harmonic-node anchored seeding.
Parallel speculative across resources; not branching at prefix-confidence anchors.
Survey covering many variants; mentions branching but not specifically harmonic-node anchored alternate-branch.
Speculative-Speculative recursively applies speculation — captures the cross-channel coupling between two speculator levels; close to bow-pressure coupling but different motivation.
